title: Install Tip or A-Axis Cable
summary: Install and route a new Tip or A-axis cable, connect the labeled M8 connectors to the documented components, secure the cable, reinstall covers and panels, and restart the operator station using the referenced startup procedure.
when_to_use: Use this procedure when installing a new Tip or A-axis cable as described in the OptiSweep Operation and Maintenance Manual section 7.3.15.2 Installation.
not_for: Do not use this runbook when connector labels or destinations do not match the documented connection points.
Do not use this runbook if the cable cannot be routed and secured as documented.
Do not continue with this runbook if the valve cover would pinch wires or the grommet cannot be inserted into the tote sensor wire notch.
Do not use this runbook as a substitute for the operator station startup procedure; restart is only referenced to page 66.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Perform internal hardware installation, cable routing, connector attachment, cover and panel reinstallation, and operator station restart reference follow-through.

safety_notes: This is not marked support-safe in the candidate and involves internal hardware work.
Stop if wires cannot be routed without dangling near the A-axis PCA or if the cable cannot be secured as documented.
Stop if the dividers cannot be positioned between the cable and air line.
Stop if any connector label or destination does not match the documented connection points.
Stop if the valve cover would pinch wires or the grommet cannot be inserted into the tote sensor wire notch.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the A-axis PCA area
Access to the valve, tote detect sensor, longer gripper sensor, and shorter gripper sensor
Access to top and/or bottom side panels
Referenced procedure: Starting The Operator Station

access_required: Access to the A-axis PCA area
Access to the valve, tote detect sensor, longer gripper sensor, and shorter gripper sensor
Access to top and/or bottom side panels
system_preconditions: New Tip or A-axis cable is available for installation.
Valve cover and four M4x50 socket-head screws are available for reinstallation.
external_references: Starting The Operator Station procedure on page 66

steps.title: Connect cable to A-axis PCA and route into cable carrier
steps.purpose: Establish the cable connection at the A-axis PCA and place the cable on the documented routing path.
steps.instruction: Plug the new cable into the A-axis PCA and route the cable around the gearbox and into and around the cable carrier.
steps.expected_result: The new cable is connected at the A-axis PCA and follows the documented path around the gearbox and through the cable carrier.
steps.healthy_condition: Cable is connected to the A-axis PCA and routed around the gearbox and cable carrier as documented.
steps.failure_condition: Cable cannot be connected at the A-axis PCA or cannot be routed around the gearbox and into the cable carrier as documented.

actions.label: Connect cable to PCA
actions.exact_action: Plug the new cable into the A-axis PCA.

actions.label: Route cable path
actions.exact_action: Route the cable around the gearbox and into and around the cable carrier.

stop_or_escalate_if: The cable cannot be connected to the A-axis PCA.
The cable cannot be routed around the gearbox and into the cable carrier as documented.

steps.title: Close cable carrier cross bars and position dividers
steps.purpose: Secure the cable within the cable carrier and maintain separation from the air line.
steps.instruction: Close all cross bars and ensure the dividers are between the cable and air line.
steps.expected_result: All cross bars are closed and the dividers separate the cable from the air line.
steps.healthy_condition: Cross bars are closed and the divider placement keeps the cable and air line separated.
steps.failure_condition: Cross bars cannot be closed correctly or the dividers cannot be positioned between the cable and air line.

actions.label: Verify divider placement
actions.exact_action: Ensure the dividers are between the cable and air line.

Cable routing through the carrier for comparison with the documented path.

stop_or_escalate_if: The dividers cannot be positioned between the cable and air line.
The cable carrier cross bars cannot be closed with the cable in the documented position.

source_evidence.text: Close all cross bars and ensure the dividers are between the cable and air line.

steps.title: Align cable markings and secure with wire ties
steps.purpose: Match the documented cable position and secure the cable at the specified tie points.
steps.instruction: Align the cable markings to the cable carrier and wire tie the cable in place as before, including both ends of the cable carrier and the tie point on the A-axis carriage.
steps.expected_result: Cable markings align to the cable carrier and the cable is secured at both ends of the cable carrier and at the A-axis carriage tie point.
steps.healthy_condition: Cable is aligned and tied in the documented locations.
steps.failure_condition: Cable markings cannot be aligned to the carrier or the cable cannot be secured at the documented tie points.

actions.label: Align cable markings
actions.exact_action: Align the cable markings to the cable carrier.

actions.label: Tie cable in place
actions.exact_action: Wire tie the cable in place as before, including both ends of the cable carrier and the tie point on the A-axis carriage.

stop_or_escalate_if: The cable cannot be secured as documented.
The cable markings cannot be aligned to the cable carrier.

source_evidence.text: Align the cable markings to the cable carrier and wire tie the cable in place as before, including both ends of the cable carrier and the tie point on the A-axis carriage.

steps.title: Contain cable near A-axis PCA
steps.purpose: Prevent loose wiring near the A-axis PCA before connector pass-through and final assembly.
steps.instruction: Near the A-axis PCA, verify that no wires are dangling and use wire ties as needed to contain the cable.
steps.expected_result: No wires are dangling near the A-axis PCA and the cable is contained.
steps.healthy_condition: Cable is contained and no loose wires are present near the A-axis PCA.
steps.failure_condition: Wires remain dangling near the A-axis PCA or cannot be contained with wire ties as needed.

actions.label: Check for dangling wires
actions.exact_action: Verify that no wires are dangling near the A-axis PCA.

actions.label: Contain cable with ties
actions.exact_action: Use wire ties as needed to contain the cable.

steps.title: Pass M8 connectors and cable jacket through grommet
steps.purpose: Move the cable end and connectors through the grommet for final device connections.
steps.instruction: Route all four M8 connectors through the grommet one at a time, then push the end of the jacketed cable through the grommet.
steps.expected_result: All four M8 connectors and the jacketed cable end are passed through the grommet.
steps.healthy_condition: Connectors and cable jacket pass through the grommet in the documented sequence.
steps.failure_condition: One or more connectors cannot be routed through the grommet or the jacketed cable end cannot be pushed through.

steps.title: Install valve cover and protect wiring
steps.purpose: Restore the valve cover while ensuring wiring is not pinched and the grommet is seated in the documented notch.
steps.instruction: Install the valve cover using the four M4x50 socket-head screws, make sure no wires are pinched along the cover edges, and insert the grommet into the notch for the tote sensor wire.
steps.expected_result: Valve cover is installed with four M4x50 socket-head screws, no wires are pinched, and the grommet is inserted into the tote sensor wire notch.
steps.healthy_condition: Valve cover is fully installed, wiring is clear of cover edges, and the grommet is seated in the tote sensor wire notch.
steps.failure_condition: Wires would be pinched by the cover, the cover cannot be installed correctly, or the grommet cannot be inserted into the tote sensor wire notch.

actions.exact_action: Insert the grommet into the notch for the tote sensor wire.

steps.healthy_condition: Operator station is restarted by following the separate page 66 startup procedure.
steps.failure_condition: The operator station cannot be restarted using the referenced procedure or the referenced procedure is unavailable.

success_criteria: The new Tip or A-axis cable is installed and connected to the A-axis PCA.
The cable is routed around the gearbox and through the cable carrier as documented.
Cross bars are closed and dividers are between the cable and air line.
Cable markings are aligned and the cable is secured with wire ties at the documented locations.
No wires are dangling near the A-axis PCA.
All four M8 connectors are routed through the grommet and connected to the documented components.
The valve cover is installed with four M4x50 socket-head screws without pinched wires and with the grommet inserted into the tote sensor wire notch.
Any necessary side panels are reinstalled.
The operator station is restarted using the referenced startup procedure.
healthy_conditions: Cable routing matches the documented path around the gearbox and cable carrier.
Dividers separate the cable from the air line.
Cable is secured at both ends of the cable carrier and at the A-axis carriage tie point.
No wires are dangling near the A-axis PCA.
Connector labels match their documented destinations: Valve, tote detect sensor, LONG, and SHORT.
Valve cover installation does not pinch wires.
failure_conditions: Wires cannot be routed without dangling near the A-axis PCA.
The cable cannot be secured as documented.
Dividers cannot be positioned between the cable and air line.
Any connector label or destination does not match the documented connection points.
The valve cover would pinch wires.
The grommet cannot be inserted into the tote sensor wire notch.
The operator station cannot be restarted using the referenced procedure.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if cable routing near the A-axis PCA, gearbox, or cable carrier cannot be completed as documented.
Escalate if divider placement between the cable and air line cannot be maintained.
Escalate if any connector label or destination does not match the documented connection points.
Escalate if the valve cover installation would pinch wires or the grommet cannot be seated in the tote sensor wire notch.
Escalate if the referenced startup procedure on page 66 is needed but unavailable.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Documented cable routing path around the gearbox and cable carrier.
Installation routing, grommet pass-through, connector handling, and valve cover area.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: Installation steps include plugging the new cable into the A-axis PCA, routing around the gearbox and cable carrier, closing cross bars with dividers between cable and air line, aligning cable markings, securing with wire ties, routing four M8 connectors through the grommet, connecting Valve, tote detect, LONG, and SHORT connectors, installing the valve cover with four M4x50 socket-head screws, reinstalling panels, and restarting the operator station.
